title: galium mollugo var. viridulum
intro: Galium mollugo var. viridulum, also known as the green milk parsley or green bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Galium mollugo var. viridulum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
